utility_evaluation.REASONING:
There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 appear in the final coverage plan. Now check completeness:
- health_coverage: Requires physical and mental health insurance with costs. Provided: "SecureLife Basic Plan (Physical: €45/month, Mental: €30/month)" — includes both components and costs. Fully specified.
- property_coverage: Requires home/contents insurance with costs. Provided: "SecureLife Basic Coverage (Photography Equipment/Home Content): €30/month" — includes home/contents and specifies cost. Fully specified.
- travel_coverage: Requires travel insurance with costs. Provided: "InsurePlus Standard Plan (Adventure Activities): €50/month" — includes travel insurance and cost. Fully specified.
- additional_services: Requires any enhancement services with costs. Provided: "Professional Liability Insurance ... needs to be secured separately..." — no cost specified. Not fully specified.
- total_budget: Requires complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. Provided: "€155/month (excluding professional liability insurance...)" — partial, excludes a mandatory component and lacks annual breakdown. Not fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists three specific items that correspond to entries in the ground-truth ratings: (1) SecureLife Basic Plan for physical health at €45/month and SecureLife Basic Plan for mental health at €30/month; (2) SecureLife Basic Coverage for property/home content at €30/month; (3) InsurePlus Standard Plan for travel at €50/month. These exact names exist in the ground-truth sections with associated ratings. The additional services note about professional liability is not a specific rated item, so it is excluded.
